currentNeeds.title: Current Needs
currentNeeds.subtitle: Discover the most urgent needs of our association and help us make a difference.

needsData.title: Food Supplies
needsData.description: Essential nutritious food baskets for 50 families in the remote rural communities.

needsData.title: School Materials
needsData.description: Providing backpacks, notebooks, and essential stationery for the upcoming school year.

needsData.title: Medical Aid
needsData.description: Emergency medical kits and specialized medicine for our local health clinic center.

needsData.title: Housing Assistance
needsData.description: Structural repairs and insulation for community housing before the winter season begins.

directSupport.title: DIRECT SUPPORT
directSupport.subtitle: Bank Transfer (RIB)
directSupport.description: The most direct way to fund our mission without platform fees.
directSupport.trustMessage: This account is officially verified. All transactions are securely handled by Attijariwafa Bank Morocco.

impactSection.title: Every Dirham Matters
impactSection.subtitle: See how your contribution directly transforms lives.

education.description: Provides essential school supplies notebooks, pens, and bags for a child for an entire academic year.

healthcare.description: Supports local medical outreach programs, covering consultations and essential medicine for elders in remote villages.

agriculture.description: Funds critical agricultural tools and sustainable irrigation pipes for small-scale local farmers.

transparencySection.title: Built on Trust.
transparencySection.description: At Association Tifaouine, we believe that impact is measured not just in numbers, but in the sustainable growth of our heritage and communities. Every dirham is accounted for in our annual transparency reports.

patients.title: Patients Treated
patients.description: Mobile clinics reaching the most remote valleys.

donationForm.title: From Donation to Impact
donationForm.subtitle: Every step ensures your support reaches those who need it most.
donationForm.successMessage: Thank you! Your donation has been submitted successfully.

step2.title: Funds are received
step2.description: Gifts are securely deposited and accounted for.

step3.title: Funds are pooled
step3.description: Individual donations are combined to amplify impact.

step4.title: Project allocation
step4.description: Our team selects the highest-priority rural initiatives.

step5.title: Community impact
step5.description: Schools, healthcare, and sustainable agriculture are funded.

form.title: Confirm Your Donation
form.description: After your transfer, please send us the receipt so we can confirm your donation and send your acknowledgement.
form.receiptHint:
Upload your receipt
PDF, JPG or PNG up to 5MB

fullname.minLength: Full name must be at least 2 characters
fullname.maxLength: Full name must be less than 100 characters
fullname.invalid: Please enter a valid name (letters and spaces only)

email.invalid: Please enter a valid email address (e.g., name@example.com)
email.maxLength: Email address must be less than 255 characters

amount.maxDecimals: Amount can have up to 2 decimal places

receipt.invalidType: Receipt must be a PDF, JPG, or PNG file

message.maxLength: Message must be less than 1000 characters

errors.submissionFailed: Failed to submit donation. Please try again.
